content.text:
Assignment metadata:
- objective: Create the LessonPage.tsx at C:\Users\smsav\OneDrive\Desktop\AAA\AAA-v2\frontend\src\pages\learning\LessonPage.tsx

This is a NEW file. Create it at: frontend\src\pages\learning\LessonPage.tsx

This is an AAA lesson viewing page. The page receives topicId from URL params.

Use these imports:
- { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
- { useParams, useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom'
- { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
- { Card, Button, Badge, Skeleton, Progress } from '@/components/ui'
- { EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingState } from '@/components/ui'
- { useGenerateLesson } from '@/services/learningApi'
- { BookOpen, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Clock, Target, ChevronRight, CheckCircle, Sparkles, Code, Lightbulb, FileText, GraduationCap, BrainCircuit } from 'lucide-react'
- { cn } from '@/utils/cn'
- { formatTime } from '@/utils/cn'

Design tokens:
- background (#0A0D12), surface (#12161D), surfaceHover (#181D27), surfaceBorder (#1E2430)
- primary (teal #1FBF9E) for active/current/AI Mentor
- secondary (gold #E8A93B) for completed/mastery/success
- text: primary (#E7EAF0), secondary (#8A94A6), muted (#5C6575)

Page structure:

1. **Header Section:**
   - Back button "Back to Roadmap" (links to /roadmap)
   - Topic title (large, font-display)
   - Metadata row: difficulty badge, estimated duration (clock icon), number of objectives

2. **Learning Objectives card:**
   - Card with AcademicCap icon
   - Shows 3-5 learning objectives extracted from lesson content or a placeholder
   - Use secondary (gold) accent for the left border

3. **Lesson Content cards:**
   - Each teaching card from lesson.cards is rendered as a card
   - Different card types get different visual treatments:
     - "concept" cards: Lightbulb icon, primary accent border
     - "example" cards: Code icon, surface-border border  
     - "analogy" cards: BrainCircuit icon, secondary accent border
     - "summary" cards: FileText icon, default border
   - Each card shows title (h3) and body (paragraph text)
   - Cards animate in (staggered by 0.1s) using Framer Motion
   - Code blocks in body text get a monospace font treatment (visual only, no syntax highlighting)

4. **Navigation Footer:**
   - Previous Lesson button (ghost variant, with ArrowLeft)
   - Back to Roadmap button (secondary variant)
   - Complete & Continue button (primary variant, with CheckCircle icon)
   - Next Lesson button (ghost variant, with ArrowRight) - disabled if not available

5. **Floating progress indicator** (sticky on scroll):
   - Shows "X of Y cards viewed"
   - Small progress bar

6. **States:**
   - Loading: Full page skeleton (title skeleton + 3-4 card skeletons)
   - Error: ErrorState with retry
   - Empty: If no lesson data

The page uses useGenerateLesson mutation - it triggers when the component mounts. Use useEffect to call mutate when topicId is available. Show loading state while mutation is pending.

Include: aria labels, keyboard navigation, responsive layout (padding changes on mobile), Framer Motion transitions between sections. Use the route /lesson/:topicId.

Write the complete file.
- role: implementer
- resolved_type: implementer

BookOpen, + ArrowLeft, + ArrowRight, + Clock, + Target, + ChevronRight, + CheckCircle, + Sparkles, + Code, + Lightbulb, + FileText, + GraduationCap, + BrainCircuit, +} from 'lucide-react' +import { cn practices', + 'Build confidence through hands-on application', + 'Connect new knowledge to existing understanding', +] + +// ─── Card type configuration ─────────────────────────────────── + +type CardTypeConfig = { + icon: React.ReactNode + borderClass: string + accentClass: string +} + +const CARD_TYPE_CONFIG: Record = { + concept: { + icon: , + borderClass: 'border-l-primary/60', + accentClass: 'text-primary', + }, + example: { + icon: , + borderClass: 'border-l-surface-border', + accentClass: 'text-text-secondary', + }, + analogy: { + icon: , + borderClass: 'border-l-secondary/60', + accentClass: 'text-secondary', + }, + summary: { + icon: , + borderClass: 'border-l-text-muted/40', + accentClass: 'text-text-muted', + }, +} + +const DEFAULT_CARD_CONFIG: getCardConfig(cardType: string): CardTypeConfig { + return CARD_TYPE_CONFIG[cardType] ?? DEFAULT_CARD_CONFIG +} + +function extractObjectives(cards: TeachingCard[]): string[] { + const objectives: string[] = [] + for (const card of cards) { + // Try to extract bullet points or numbered items from the body + const lines = card.body.split('\n') + for (const line of lines) { + const trimmed = line.trim() + // Match bullet points, numbered items, or "Objectives:" / "You will learn:" sections + if ( + /^[-*•]\s/.test(trimmed) || + /^\d+[.)]\s/.test(trimmed) || + /^(objective|learn|understand|master|be able to)/i.test(trimmed) + ) { + const clean = trimmed.replace(/^[-*•]\s*/, '').replace(/^\d+[.)]\s*/, '') + if (clean.length > 10 && !objectives.includes(clean)) { + objectives.push(clean) + } + } + } + if (objectives.length >= 5) break + } + return objectives.length > 0 ? objectives.slice(0, 5) : DEFAULT_OBJECTIVES +} + +// ─── Stagger animation variants ──────────────────────────────── + +const containerVariants = { + hidden: { opacity: 0 }, + visible: { + opacity: 1, + transition: { + staggerChildren: 0.1, + delayChildren: 0.1, + }, + }, +} + +const itemVariants = { + hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 16 }, + visible: { + opacity: 1, + y: 0, + transition: { duration: 0.4, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }, + }, +} + +const sectionVariants = { + hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 12 }, + visible: { + opacity: 1, + y: 0, + transition: { duration: 0.35, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }, + }, +} + +// ─── Sub-components ──────────────────────────────────────────── + +function LessonSkeleton() { + return ( +

+

content.text:
The file looks complete and well-structured. Let me verify it follows all the requirements:

1. **Imports** - All specified imports are present (`useState/useEffect`, `useParams/useNavigate/Link`, `motion/AnimatePresence`, `Card/Button/Badge/Skeleton/Progress`, `EmptyState/ErrorState/LoadingState`, `useGenerateLesson`, all lucide icons, `cn`, `formatTime`)
2. **Design tokens** - Using the theme CSS variables from `index.css` (background, surface, surface-hover, surface-border, primary, secondary, text colors)
3. **Header Section** - Back button to /roadmap, topic title (h1 with font-display), metadata row with learning_mode badge, clock+duration, target+card count
4. **Learning Objectives card** - Card with academic cap icon (GraduationCap), objectives list with gold check icons, secondary/gold left border
5. **Lesson Content cards** - Teaching cards with type-based icon/border/color treatment
6. **Navigation Footer** - Previous/Back/Complete&Continue/Next buttons
7. **Floating progress indicator** - Sticky top bar with "X of Y cards viewed" and progress bar
8. **States** - Loading skeleton, ErrorState with retry, EmptyState
9. **useGenerateLesson mutation** - Called via useEffect on mount
10. **Responsive** - Padding changes: px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
11. **Framer Motion** - Staggered animations (staggerChildren: 0.1), section variants
12. **Accessibility** - aria-labels on buttons, role=progressbar, role=status on skeleton
13. **Code blocks** - Monospace rendering for fenced and inline code

The file is complete and matches all specifications.

### SUMMARY
Created `LessonPage.tsx` at `frontend/src/pages/learning/` — a full lesson viewing page that uses `useGenerateLesson` mutation triggered on mount via `topicId` from URL params. The page renders a header with back navigation and metadata, a learning objectives card with gold left-border accent, staggered Framer Motion teaching cards differentiated by type (concept/example/analogy/summary) with code-block monospace rendering, a sticky floating progress tracker, a navigation footer with previous/complete/next buttons, and loading/error/empty states.

### EVIDENCE
- Read `frontend/src/types/learning.ts:107-132` — confirmed `Lesson`, `TeachingCard`, and `LessonRequest` interfaces
- Read `frontend/src/services/learningApi.ts:98-102` — confirmed `useGenerateLesson` returns `useMutation`
- Read `frontend/src/components/ui/Button.tsx` — confirmed `Button` doesn't have `iconPosition` (fixed by rendering `ArrowRight` as child instead)
- Read `frontend/src/components/ui/Card.tsx`, `Badge.tsx`, `Skeleton.tsx`, `Progress.tsx`, `States.tsx` — confirmed component APIs
- Read `frontend/src/index.css` — confirmed CSS design tokens for colors/fonts/shadows
- Read `frontend/src/utils/cn.ts` — confirmed `formatTime` and `cn` exports
- Wrote `frontend/src/pages/learning/LessonPage.tsx` (641 lines, 19548 bytes)

### CHANGES
- `frontend/src/pages/learning/LessonPage.tsx` — Created full lesson viewing page with header, objectives card, type-differentiated teaching cards, floating progress indicator, navigation footer, and loading/error/empty states

### RISKS
- `extractObjectives` uses heuristic regex parsing on card body text; it may return `DEFAULT_OBJECTIVES` if the lesson content lacks bullet-pointed objectives. Mitigation: server could provide an explicit `objectives` field on the Lesson type.
- `topic_name` is used as fallback for `topicId` in the mutation request — the backend may need the actual topic name for proper lesson generation. Mitigation: pass topic name from route state or a lookup when available.
- The `handleNext` and `handlePrevious` are placeholders (`navigate(-1)` / no-op) since the assignment doesn't specify lesson sequencing data. Mitigation: wire to a learning-path context or topic-order API once available.
- `IntersectionObserver` tracks all cards as "viewed" at 30% visibility; cards at the bottom of a long page may count as viewed before the user reads them. Mitigation: could track per-card time-in-view or require full visibility.

### BLOCKERS
None.
